specs.title: cp-000: File input accepts opml and xml files
cp-001: POST apifeedsopmlimport with XML content
cp-002: Response reports total feeds imported skipped failed
cp-003: Error details for failed imports
cp-004: Subscriptions refresh after import
cp-005: subscriptions array of users feed subscriptions
cp-006: articles loaded articles with readstarsave status
cp-007: selectedFeedId currently selected feed null all
cp-008: selectedFolder currently selected folder
cp-009: viewFilter all unread starred default unread
cp-010: sortBy newest oldest relevance
cp-011: layout list card magazine
cp-012: selectedArticleId article in reading pane
cp-013: copilotOpen AI panel visibility
cp-014: copilotMessages chat history
cp-015: copilotSourceTier full_paper abstract_only title_only
cp-016: totalUnread aggregate unread count
cp-017: hasMore pagination flag
cp-018: page current pagination page
cp-019: loadSubscriptions subscribe unsubscribe
cp-020: loadArticles loadMore
cp-021: markRead markAllRead toggleStar saveToLibrary
cp-022: setSelectedFeed setSelectedFolder setViewFilter
cp-023: openCopilot closeCopilot summarizeArticle sendCopilotMessage
cp-024: clearFilters clearSearch clearCopilot
cp-025: Feed store defaults to viewFilter unread sortBy newest sortDir desc and layout c
cp-026: Feed store does not use zustand persist middleware page state is refetched fresh
cp-027: Page mount triggers both loadSubscriptions and loadArticles in parallel
cp-028: Empty-state gate is subscriptionslength 0 isLoadingSubscriptions articles alone
cp-029: Header unread helper text renders only when totalUnread 0
cp-030: Export button fetches apifeedsopmlexport and downloads scholarsync-feedsopml onl

cp-033: Canceling the import file picker leaves the page unchanged
cp-034: Import reads the selected file as text and posts it to apifeedsopmlimport with C
